_meta.purpose: Historical regression fixture — 2021/22 UK tax parameters. Used by test-persona-snapshots.mjs to validate engine behaviour against 5-year-ago snapshots. NOT loaded by fq-calculator.js (which uses tax-2026.json). Do NOT use for any live calculation.
_meta.notes: Values as enacted for tax year 2021/22. Key differences vs 2026: pension AA £40k (not £60k), MPAA £4k (not £10k), CGT AEA £12,300 (not £3k), additional rate threshold £150k (not £125,140), NI employee 12%/9%, HICBC from £50k (not £60k), SIPP outside estate (no April 2027 rule), dividend rates 7.5/32.5/38.1, no Cash ISA sub-limit, FHL regime still active, AIM BPR 100% (not 50%), VCT relief 30% (not 20%), LTA £1,073,100 still in force.

_disclaimer: Historical parameters for regression testing only. Do not use for planning advice. Always verify current rules with a qualified tax adviser.

income.highIncomeChildBenefitNote: HICBC clawed back above £50,000 — 1% per £100 above threshold (full clawback at £60,000). Changed to £60,000/£200 rate from April 2024.

capitalGains._note_cgt: Non-residential CGT rates: 10% (BR), 20% (HR) in 2021. Raised to 18%/24% from 30 October 2024.
capitalGains._note_property: Residential property CGT: 18% (BR), 28% (HR) in 2021. 28% cut to 24% from 6 April 2024.
capitalGains._note_badr: BADR 10% in 2021. Raised to 14% from 6 April 2025, 18% from 6 April 2026.
capitalGains._note_reporting: 30-day reporting requirement in 2021. Extended to 60 days from 27 October 2021.

inheritanceTax._note_aim_bpr: AIM BPR was 100% in 2021. Cut to 50% from 6 April 2026. No combined £1m cap existed in 2021 — added from April 2026.
inheritanceTax._note_combined_allowance: No combined APR/BPR £1m cap in 2021/22. Unrestricted 100% relief on qualifying assets.
inheritanceTax._note_sipp_iht: In 2021/22 SIPP/DC pensions were OUTSIDE the estate. Inclusion from April 2027 not yet legislated.

pension._note_aa: AA £40,000 in 2021/22. Raised to £60,000 from 6 April 2023.
pension._note_tapered: Tapered AA: adjusted income >£240k (threshold), floor £4,000. Threshold raised to £260k, floor to £10k, from April 2023.
pension._note_mpaa: MPAA £4,000 in 2021/22 (temporarily cut from £10k on 6 Mar 2020 during COVID). Restored to £10,000 from 6 April 2023.
pension._note_lta: LTA £1,073,100 in 2021/22. Frozen until abolition on 6 April 2024.
pension._note_lsa: LSA/LSDBA concepts do not exist in 2021 — LTA regime in force. Use lifetimeAllowance instead.
pension.taxFreeCashNote: 25% of crystallised fund tax-free. Capped at 25% of LTA (£268,275 equivalent) for most. Pre-2006 enhanced protection preserved higher TFC.
pension._note_sp: New State Pension 2021/22: £179.60/week = £9,339.20/year. Triple lock applied minimum 2.5% increase.
pension._note_sipp_estate: SIPP/DC pension funds are OUTSIDE the estate in 2021. Nomination discretion applies. IHT inclusion not yet announced.

isa._note_cash_isa: No Cash ISA sub-limit in 2021. The £12k sub-limit for under-65s was introduced from April 2026.

vct._note: VCT IT relief was 30% in 2021. Cut to 20% from 6 April 2026.

seis._note: SEIS limit was £100k in 2021. Doubled to £200k from 6 April 2023.

sdlt._note: SDLT temporary stamp duty holiday in effect until 30 June 2021 (£500k nil rate), tapered to 30 Sep 2021 (£250k nil rate). Standard rates from 1 Oct 2021.
sdlt._note_surcharge: 3% surcharge in 2021. Raised to 5% from 31 October 2024.

furnishedHolidayLettings._note_fhl: FHL special tax status (BADR, pension contribution basis, capital allowances) still active in 2021. Removed from 6 April 2025.

nationalInsurance._note_pt: NI PT £9,568 in 2021/22. Aligned with PA (£12,570) from 6 July 2022 after Spring Statement.
nationalInsurance._note_ni: NI employee rate was 12%/2% in 2021. Cut to 10% (Jan 2024), then 8% (Apr 2024).
nationalInsurance._note_class4: Class 4 NI was 9%/2% in 2021. Cut to 6%/2% from 6 April 2024.
nationalInsurance._note_ea: Employment Allowance £4,000 in 2021/22. Raised to £5,000 from April 2023, then £10,500 from April 2025.

_note_deadline: No SIPP IHT deadline in 2021. Using far-future date so engine deadline calculations return safe values.
_purpose: Regression fixture for test-persona-snapshots.mjs. Historical 2021/22 UK tax parameters.
